meta.title: Place — a place, not a platform
meta.description: A place for up to 150 people who know each other. You come in, catch up, take part if you want, and leave. No FOMO, no metrics, no algorithm.

hero.title: A place, not a platform.
hero.subhead: Up to 150 people who know each other. No FOMO, no metrics, no algorithm.
hero.ctaHint: 30 days free. No card to start.
hero.summary: You come in, catch up, take part if you want, and leave.

socialProof.text: For clubs, workshops, teams and communities of up to 150 people.

problema.title: Community platforms are not on your side.

points.title: They treat you as an engagement generator
points.body: Their business improves when you and your people spend more time inside. Yours, not necessarily.

points.title: They treat your people as audience
points.body: Metrics, endless feeds, notifications that chase. People turned into numbers that go up.

points.title: They take commission on your own community
points.body: A percentage of what your people pay, gone before it reaches you.

comoFunciona.title: A place with its own rhythm.
comoFunciona.intro: Mechanisms designed so it's a place, not an attention machine.

mechanisms.title: Conversations by turns
mechanisms.body: People speak in turns, not in a chat that scrolls away. What's said stays and is read calmly.

mechanisms.title: Silent presence
mechanisms.body: You see who's here through a discreet visual cue. Never an anxious text or an animation that begs.

mechanisms.title: The Place has open hours
mechanisms.body: It opens and closes when its members decide. After hours, the place rests — and so do you.

mechanisms.title: Topics don't die
mechanisms.body: A conversation from months ago comes back with a single message. Nothing expires from inactivity.

mechanisms.title: Its own visual identity
mechanisms.body: Every Place picks its colors and tone. It feels yours, not just another template.

diferenciacion.title: A community, not an audience.
diferenciacion.body: Other platforms earn more the bigger and more addicted your community gets. We set the ceiling at 150 and don't take commission from your people. Our incentive is for your place to be good, not infinite.

rows.community: Up to 150 — everyone knows each other

diferenciacion.dunbar: 150 isn't a plan limit: it's a design decision. It's close to Dunbar's number — the count of people someone keeps a real bond with.

paraQuien.title: Your place, whatever you bring together.

tabs.label: Creators
tabs.headline: Your community, not your audience.
tabs.body: For the creator tired of the engagement model: a place for your close people, where what they pay reaches you and no one competes for anyone's attention.

tabs.label: Organizations
tabs.headline: The club, the workshop, the group — with a place of its own.
tabs.body: For clubs, workshops and groups that already exist and need a quiet place to meet, remember, and get organized — without it turning into another social network.

tabs.label: Companies
tabs.headline: An intranet that feels like a place.
tabs.body: For teams that want a calm internal community — not another channel that shouts. Own identity, own domain, own rhythm.

pricing.title: Transparent, no hidden costs.
pricing.subhead: 0% commission on the Community plan. What your community pays reaches you.
pricing.freeTrialNote: You try the whole place. No card to start.

plans.name: Hobby
plans.description: To start your place and see how it feels.

plans.name: Community
plans.description: The full place, with 0% commission on what your community pays.

pricing.commissionLine: 0% commission. Your community isn't our product.
pricing.footnote: The 150 ceiling isn't a plan limit: it's the design decision that makes it a place.

items.q: Without aggressive notifications, doesn't it die?
items.a: The opposite. Dormant topics don't die: any message revives a conversation from months ago. Open hours don't switch off the community — they make it a place you come back to, not an app that chases you.
150 is deliberate: close to Dunbar's number, the count of real bonds someone keeps. If you're more, you're probably several communities — you can have more than one Place.

items.q: What about my data and my people's?
items.a: No lock-in and right to be forgotten: each person can leave and erase their trace. Your community is yours, not an asset we hold on to.

items.q: What languages is it available in?
items.a: Spanish from day one. English, French and Portuguese on the way. What your people write stays in the language they wrote it in: we never translate it for you.

items.q: Why do I pay a subscription?
items.a: Because that way we don't charge you commission for your people. You pay a fixed, transparent price; what your community contributes reaches you.

ctaFinal.title: Your place is waiting whenever you want to open it.
ctaFinal.subhead: 30 days free. No rush, no card to start.

captures.comoFunciona: [SCREENSHOT: view of a conversation by turns inside a Place, with the silent presence of who's reading]
captures.paraQuien: [SCREENSHOT: the same Place with its own visual identity — colors and tone configured by its owner]

terminos.title: Terms of service
terminos.body: Initial draft. The final legal content is written before public launch. For inquiries, write to hola@place.community.

privacidad.title: Privacy
privacidad.body: Initial draft. Place is designed with right to be forgotten and no lock-in: each person can leave and erase their trace. The final policy is written before public launch. For inquiries, write to hola@place.community.

access.title: Sign in
access.subtitle: Sign in to your account or create a new one.
access.termsRequired: You need to accept the terms
access.loginFailedNotice: We couldn't sign you in. Check your email and password.
access.signupFailedNotice: We couldn't create the account. Maybe you already have one? Try signing in.

wizard.title: Create your place
wizard.namePlaceholder: The name people will see on entering
wizard.slugReserved: That address is reserved, pick another one
wizard.slugFormat: Lowercase, numbers and hyphens only (3 characters minimum)
wizard.slugAvailableHint: Final availability is confirmed when the place is created
wizard.previewLabel: This is how it will look
wizard.guardrailNotice: We adjusted a color so the text reads well
wizard.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters
wizard.displayNamePlaceholder: How you'll be seen in your place
wizard.termsRequired: You need to accept the terms to create your place
wizard.slugTakenNotice: That address already has an owner, try another one
wizard.invalidNotice: Check the data and try again
wizard.errorNotice: We couldn't create your place. Try again in a moment.
wizard.accountFailedNotice: We couldn't create the account. Maybe you already have one with this email — try signing in.
wizard.paletteModeLabel: How do you pick the colors?
wizard.defaultLocaleLabel: What language does your place speak?

inbox.emptyTitle: You don't have a place yet.
inbox.emptyBody: You can create your own or join one with an invitation.

language.title: Place language
language.description: It's the language your place will be shown in to whoever visits it. You can change it whenever you want.
language.label: Language
language.errorNotice: We couldn't save the language. Try again.

domain.title: Custom domain
domain.description: Connect your own domain (e.g. comunidad.mi-marca.com). Your place will still always be available at {slug}.place.community.
domain.descriptionVerified: Your domain is set up. Members of your place can access it directly at {domain}.
domain.pendingDescription: We're waiting for {domain} to point here.
domain.downrevertedBannerBody: We detected that {domain}'s DNS no longer points to Place. Re-configure the records shown below to reactivate it.
domain.pendingSlaCopy: DNS propagation can take from 1 minute to 48 hours depending on your provider.
domain.pendingVercelUnavailable: We're verifying, we'll try again shortly.
domain.verifiedDescription: Your domain is validated with SSL issued. Soon you'll be able to use it as a direct entry to your place.
domain.archiveConfirmBody: This deactivates the domain. Your place will still be available at {slug}.place.community.
domain.errorInvalidDomain: That domain isn't valid. Check the format (e.g. comunidad.mi-marca.com).
domain.errorReserved: That domain is reserved by the system. Use your own domain.
domain.errorIdnNotSupported: For now we only accept ASCII domains. We'll support internationalized domains soon.
domain.errorDomainTaken: That domain is already linked to another Place. If it's yours, get in touch.
domain.errorLimitReached: You already have a domain linked to this place. Remove it before adding another.
domain.errorVercelUnavailable: We couldn't reach the verifier. Try again in a few minutes.
domain.errorArchiveGeneric: We couldn't remove the domain. Try again.

list.emptyDescription: When someone accepts an invitation, they'll appear here.

actionsMenu.confirmRemoveBody: Remove {name} from this place? They'll lose access immediately.
actionsMenu.confirmRevokeBody: {name} will no longer be a co-owner. Their membership stays.
actionsMenu.confirmTransferBody: You're about to transfer the founder role to {name}. Your ownership goes away.
actionsMenu.errorTargetNotActiveMember: This person is no longer an active member.
actionsMenu.errorCannotRevokeFounder: The founder can't be revoked — transfer first.
actionsMenu.errorLastOwner: You can't revoke the last owner of the place.
actionsMenu.errorTargetNotOwner: This person is no longer an owner.
actionsMenu.errorTargetAlreadyOwner: This person is already an owner.
actionsMenu.errorTargetNotMember: This person is not an active member.

inviteModal.title: Invite member
inviteModal.description: We'll generate an invitation link. Anyone with the link can join — share it only with the person you want to invite.
inviteModal.successHeading: Done. Share this link with the invited person:
inviteModal.errorInvalidExpires: Expiration must be between 1 and 90 days.
inviteModal.errorExpiresInPast: Expiration is already in the past.
inviteModal.errorGeneric: We couldn't generate the link. Try again.

pending.emptyDescription: When you create an invitation, it'll appear here until the person accepts or it expires.
pending.confirmBody: The link sent to {email} will stop working.
pending.errorAlreadyAccepted: This invitation was already accepted. To undo, remove the member instead.
pending.errorGeneric: We couldn't revoke it. Try again.

headline.inputPlaceholder: One line saying something about you in this context…
headline.errorNotMember: Only members of this place can edit the headline.

authGate.title: Sign in on Place
authGate.body: To manage **{slug}** you need to sign in at its original Place address. This URL is the public face of the place for your visitors.
authGate.help: In the meantime, your visitors can keep using this domain as usual.

sso.failureTitle: We couldn't sign you in automatically
sso.failureBody: Something went wrong while verifying your identity for **{slug}**. You can go back to its original URL to sign in manually.
